name: stockyard-tenantwall
description: Tenant isolation middleware. Per-tenant rate limits, spend caps, model access, and cache isolation. Build multi-tenant AI products without custom infrastructure.

tools.name: tenantwall_tenants
tools.description: List all known tenants with usage summary.

tools.name: tenantwall_tenant_usage
tools.description: Get detailed usage for a specific tenant.

tools.name: tenantwall_set_limits
tools.description: Set rate limits and spend caps for a tenant.

tools.name: tenantwall_block
tools.description: Block a tenant from making LLM requests.

tools.name: tenantwall_stats
tools.description: Get multi-tenant statistics: active tenants, total spend, top consumers.

tools.name: tenantwall_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the TenantWall proxy is running and healthy.
